reasoning: This is a pie chart representing the percentage distribution of various product categories. The largest segment is 'Others' at 27%, followed by 'Mountain-200' at 17% and 'Mountain-100' at 15%. The smallest segments are 'HL Mountain Frame' and 'Road-350-W', each at 4%. The calibration for this chart type is that the sum of all percentages equals 100%.

props.title: Product Category Distribution
props.insightText: This pie chart illustrates the percentage distribution of different product categories. 'Others' represents the largest segment at 27%, followed by 'Mountain-200' at 17%, and 'Mountain-100' at 15%. The smallest individual categories are 'HL Mountain Frame' and 'Road-350-W', both at 4%.
